mainEntity.name: Difference between temporary total vs partial disability in Cottonwood Heights?
mainEntity.text: Difference between temporary total vs partial disability in Cottonwood Heights?

acceptedAnswer.text: TTD: 66.67% wage loss when can't work (max $1,230/wk 2023). TPD: When working light duty at reduced pay, partial wage replacement[3].

suggestedAnswer.text: Cottonwood Heights: TTD for bedridden/full loss; TPD for modified work. Both cap at state average wage. Insurers push TPD early—resist without FCE. Permanent follows MMI[1][3].

name: TTD vs TPD Cottonwood Heights Workers Comp
description: TTD: 66.67% wage loss when can't work (max $1,230/wk 2023). TPD: When working light duty at reduced pay, partial wage replacement[3].
